compiled_state.title: Batch epic-vs-spec scan operation
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
Add the third motivating op: scan open epics related to a spec using batched
API calls (a batch evaluator rather than a single agent loop), reusing the
findings contract and a non-agent runner behind the same protocol.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Op selects candidate epics for a spec and evaluates them in batches
- [ ] Reuses `review_result`/findings contract
- [ ] Bounded cost (batch size + caps); offline test

comments.body: Implemented scan_epics_for_spec (library/CLI rebar scan-spec/gated MCP scan_spec): a batch evaluator that pulls the stores open epics, evaluates them against a spec in batches (one runner pass each, bounded cost) for coverage gaps/conflicts/overlaps via a new spec-alignment reviewer, then concatenates+ranks findings. Reuses the findings contract + runner seam. Offline test seeds 3 epics, batch_size=2 -> 2 batches via FakeRunner.
comments.author: Claude
